revision.text:
[[en:Heijō Shrine]][[ja:平壌神社]][[ko:평양신사]][[simple:Heijō Shrine]][[zh:平壤神社]] {{Short description|1913–1945 Shinto shrine in Pyongyang}} {{Expand Japanese|date=May 2018}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Heijō Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = File:평양신사측면전경.png | caption = The shrine (date unknown) | coordinates = {{Coord|39.03534|N|125.7552|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | architectural_style = | location = {{ill|Pyongyang|en|Pyongyang|qid=Q18808|lt=Pyongyang}}, {{ill|Korea under Japanese rule|en|Korea under Japanese rule|qid=Q503585|lt=Korea, Empire of Japan}} | deity = [[Kunitama|Kunitama Okami]]
[[Amaterasu|Amaterasu Okami]] | years_built = | groundbreaking_date = | start_date = | stop_date = | topped_out_date = | year_completed = 1913 | opened_date = | relocated_date = | renovation_date = | closing_date = | date_demolished = August 16, 1945 | cost = | owner = | height = | material = | area = | floor_count = | floor_area = | architect = | date_destroyed = August 16, 1945 | architecture_firm = | parking = | public_transit = | website = | references = | footnotes = | prefecture= {{ill|Heian-nan Prefecture|qid=Q11060859}} }} {{Nihongo|'''Heijō Shrine'''|平壌神社|Heijō jinja|lead=yes|{{Korean|hangul=평양신사}}}} was a [[Shinto]] shrine in {{ill|Pyongyang|en|Pyongyang|qid=Q18808|lt=Pyongyang}}, Korea during the {{ill|Korea under Japanese rule|en|Korea under Japanese rule|qid=Q503585|lt=Japanese colonial period}}. It was established in 1913{{Cite web |title=平壌神社 {{!}} 　海外神社（跡地）に関するデータベース　神奈川大学非文字資料研究センター |url=http://www.himoji.jp/database/db04/permalink.php?id=2663 |access-date=2023-10-09 |website=www.himoji.jp}} and destroyed in 1945. Its name derived from the Japanese name for Pyongyang during its occupation of Korea. The shrine's main annual festival was held on October 2. It was formerly a national shrine of the third Rank (国幣小社, ''[[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Kokuhei-shōsha]]'') in the [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto Shrines]].{{Citation needed|date=October 2023}} The shrine was destroyed on August 16, 1945: just after {{ill|Surrender of Japan|en|Surrender of Japan|qid=Q6540361|lt=Japan first announced its surrender}} in World War II. That day, local Koreans set fire to the shrine and destroyed it. Hundreds of similar cases arose throughout the peninsula in the following week.{{Cite web |title=神社참배 거부 18개교 日帝, 가차 없이 폐교｜주간동아 |url=https://weekly.donga.com/society/3/05/11/77546/1 |access-date=2023-09-17 |website=주간동아 |language=ko}} In modern times, the site is a park, with a statue of {{ill|Kim Il Sung|en|Kim Il Sung|qid=Q41117|lt=Kim Il Sung}} built at the site of the shrine's building. ==Gallery== {{Gallery |평양신사배치도.png |Map of layout of the shrine (1942) |평양신사측면전경.png |Side of the shrine (1942) |Heijo_Shrine.JPG |Another view of the shrine }} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.genbu.net/haizetu/old/pyonyan_title.htm Historical page with photographs] *[http://www.himoji.jp/database/db04/permalink.php?id=91 Overseas shrines database] {{Korea under Japanese rule}} {{Shinmei shrines}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Korea-reli-stub}} [[simple:Heijō Shrine]] [[en:Heijō Shrine]] [[ja:平壌神社]] [[ko:평양신사]] [[zh:平壤神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11482369}} [[Category:1913 establishments in Korea]] [[Category:1945 disestablishments in Japan]] [[Category:20th-century Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Culture in Pyongyang]] [[Category:History of Pyongyang]] [[Category:Kokuhei Shōsha]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures completed in 1913]] [[Category:Religious organizations disestablished in 1945]] [[Category:Religious organizations established in 1913]] [[Category:Shinmei shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Korea]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] {{translated page|ja|平壌神社|version=105146564|comment=Imported full ja history}} == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称=平壌神社 | 画像 =[[Image:Heijo Shrine.JPG|250px|center]] | 所在地=朝鮮平安南道平壌府慶上町 | 祭神=天照大神
国魂大神 | 社格=国幣小社 | 創建={{jalink|1913年|Q2080}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}2年） | 本殿={{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} | 例祭={{jalink|10月2日|Q2932}} }} '''平壌神社'''（へいじょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|日本統治時代の朝鮮|Q503585|朝鮮}}{{jalink|平安南道 (日本統治時代)|Q11060859|平安南道}}平壌府（現・{{jalink|朝鮮民主主義人民共和国|Q423}}{{jalink|平壌直轄市}}）にあった{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|国幣小社}}。 {{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}}・{{jalink|国魂|Q9692242|国魂大神}}であった{{オープンアクセス}}[{{NDLDC|1909346/829}} 『国体神祇辞典』小倉鏗爾著 (錦正堂, 1940) - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション] 1505頁（2018年1月30日閲覧）。 == 歴史 == {{jalink|1913年|Q2080}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}2年）{{jalink|1月1日|Q2150}}に鎮座祭が行われ、{{jalink|1916年|Q2087}}（大正5年）{{jalink|5月4日|Q2549}}に正式な神社になった。{{jalink|1936年|Q18649}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}11年）9月に新しい{{jalink|神社建築|Q3080012|社殿}}が落成し、{{jalink|1937年|Q18647}}（昭和12年）{{jalink|5月15日|Q2562}}、{{jalink|慶尚北道 (日本統治時代)|Q625101|慶尚北道}}{{jalink|大邱広域市|Q20927|大邱府}}の{{jalink|大邱神社|Q11439410}}とともに国幣小社に列格した。{{jalink|1945年|Q5240}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}20年）、{{jalink|玉音放送|Q709465}}により{{jalink|第二次世界大戦|Q362}}の{{jalink|日本の降伏|Q6540361}}が国民に伝えられた{{jalink|8月15日|Q2774}}の夜、平壌神社は放火により焼失した{{Cite book|和書|author=森田芳夫|title=朝鮮終戦の記録 : 米ソ両軍の進駐と日本人の引揚|publisher=巌南堂書店|date=1964-08-15|pages=182|id={{NDLJP|3014647/107}}}}。その後、再建されることなく廃座された。 鎮座地は{{jalink|牡丹峰|Q717264}}（ぼたんほう、モランボン）と呼ばれる小高い{{jalink|丘|Q54050}}の南端で、平壌の景勝地である。1946年に平壌神社の跡地には{{jalink|牡丹峰劇場}}が建設されている{{Cite journal|和書|title=うまれかわる朝鮮――｢北朝鮮紀行｣より / 徐光霽|journal=新しい世界|issue=24|publisher=日本共産党出版局事業部|date=1949-07-01|pages=35|id={{NDLJP|3542933/19}}}}{{Cite book|和書|editor=城戸又一|title=素顔の社会主義国 : 十人のジャーナリストは報告する|publisher=東洋書館|date=1956-12-15|pages=140|id={{NDLJP|2975357/74}}}}。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{Normdaten}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:朝鮮の神社]] [[Category:国幣小社]] [[Category:神明神社|廃へいしようしんしや]] [[Category:平壌市の建築物|廃へいしようしんしや]] [[Category:平壌市の歴史]] [[Category:平壌市の文化]] [[Category:現存しない北朝鮮の建築物]] [[Category:1913年竣工の建築物]] [[Category:1945年解体の建築物]] [[Category:日本の放火事件]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
